title: Align status projection health with Doctor and Registry Truth
goal: Prevent status-projection from reporting healthy when authoritative Bureau diagnostics report a current blocker or lifecycle mismatch.

acceptance.assertion: Status projection documents which Doctor and Registry Truth severities affect its health result.
Compared health inputs are generated from the same registry head and bounded observation time.
Missing or stale diagnostics produce explicit stale or unavailable state rather than optimistic health.
Fixtures cover healthy, warning, blocker, stale and unavailable combinations.

metadata.source: Bureau total audit and Truth Model v2 design
